args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Walkthrough of the completed RARA Barefoot clone, summarising the implementation details."}
args.CodeContent:
"# RARA Barefoot Clone Complete

I have successfully built the complete static HTML clone of the RARA Barefoot website as requested. The codebase resides in `C:\Users\Madhav Mehrotra\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\rara-clone`.

## Changes Made

### 1. Site Architecture & Pages
- Created a fully linked multi-page structure: `index.html`, `mens.html`, `womens.html`, `product.html`, `why-barefoot.html`, `barefoot-science.html`, `about.html`, `community.html`, `blogs.html`, `help.html`, `returns.html`, `cart.html`, and `collab.html`.
- Implemented a unified `styles.css` for consistent, framework-free vanilla CSS styling across all pages.
- Implemented a shared `main.js` to handle all interactivity.

### 2. Customisations Applied
- **Enlarged Logo & Shrink-on-Scroll**: The logo is set to `clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.8rem)` and smoothly shrinks down to `1.4rem` when you scroll past 60px using the `.scrolled` state in `styles.css` and the event listener in `main.js`.
- **Product Card Gradient Overlay**: Added the requested `::after` pseudo-element on `.product-card__media` to overlay the white-to-transparent gradient on product cards to make the light grey backgrounds blend into the pure white site background.
- **Gully Labs-style Scrub Hover**: Attached the script in `main.js` that listens to `mousemove` over `.product-card`. It detects the mouse position (X-axis relative to width) and scrubs through the multiple `img` elements. Tested on the featured product grid using Unsplash placeholder images.
- **Typography & Aesthetics**: Loaded `Anton` for headings and `Geist` for body text. Enforced the `0.06em` letter spacing for headings and `0.03em` for body as requested. The color palette correctly utilises the specified black, white, and accent colors.

## Verification
- The local development server is currently running. You can view the live site by opening your browser to `http://localhost:5174`.
- All CSS and JS effects, including the slideshow, sticky navbar, and hover effects, are functional."
args.Description: "Created a walkthrough of the completed static site clone"
